title: YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW WALNUT STREET YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient services for drug and alcohol use disorders for youth and their families, including integrated mental health care. Services are available in the community, including schools. Also provides a bilingual, culturally specific outpatient program for Latino youth and their families. 971 SW Walnut Street Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Ages 12-18 (19 if still in high school) and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm Email (503) 640-5291 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 640-5291 Intake (503) 640-9010 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Varies by program. Nearly all LifeWorks Northwest programs accept OHP/Medicaid and Medicare. Some programs serve uninsured individuals on sliding scale. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet Bus 57 to the corner of SW Oak and SW Armco Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Adolescents Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - STRENGTHENING FAMILIES PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SEVERE MENTAL ILLNESS SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADULT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWORKS NW WALNUT STREET
